Document:
# BOCASKREEO-CLASS OUTLAW SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Small
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 2-3
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Plasma
# Shuttle Brief
[color=#ff0000]Warning![/color] [color=#ffa500]This ship does not have an atmos setup that includes[/color] [color=#c4f5ff]Oxygen![/color]
A tiny plastitanium vessel suited to a crew of 2 to 3 outlaws. Has two broadside cannons and a rear-facing disposals launcher. Runs on plasma.
# Ship Functions
Console buttons 1 and 2 control thruster state.
N2 based atmosphere.
# Outlaw

# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Spacefaring vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
